  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

TCU_XBGChina_V3.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7CA
Recv ID: 7DA
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 77
Func Name: DCM Renault

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "21",
    "supplier": "LANYOU",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 55808,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ACC signal did not ON in case of IGN_ON"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 55816,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Antenna open circuit"
  },
  {

    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Antenna short circuit"
  },

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CAN communication error"
  },
  {

    "name": "DID is not configured"
  },
  {

    "name": "DTC_DCM_FLASH_ERROR"
  },
  {

    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Failed to read SIM card"
  },
  {

    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "GPS antenna is not connected"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 44784,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Internal battery temperature is too high"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 55810,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "MCU and 4G module communication error"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 53264,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "MCU CAN control register read and write failed"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 55842,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "No SIM card detected"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 55847,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Power supply voltage is too high"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 55846,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Power supply voltage is too low"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 55849,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "RTC module Error"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 55848,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "RTM temperature is too high"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 55844,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "SIM card status is Locked"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 55812,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "VIN code is not configured"
  }
]
